conventions_srccollections_515502676648.content: Payload CMS sensitive fields use both access.read/update: () => false AND hidden: true for defense-in-depth.

conventions_tests_515503980369.content: Tests are colocated in the same directory as the collection under test, using findField(name) and makeMockReq() helpers.

facts_auth_515505175229.content: PBKDF2 params (25000 iterations, 512 length, sha256) must match AuthService.verifyPassword exactly for cross-verification to work.

facts_srcauth_515506318013.content: Centralize password hashing into a dedicated utility (password-hash.ts) rather than inline in the collection, to keep hashing logic reusable and testable.

thoughts_srcserverauthauthservicets_6828.content: Utility functions defined and tested are not automatically integrated; must explicitly wire new code into existing consumers like AuthService

thoughts_auth_1207034354692.content: Creating a new utility function without wiring it into the consuming code makes it dead code. The verifyPasswordHash utility existed but AuthService never called it, breaking the acceptance criterion.

conventions_srcauth_1207035923724.content: PBKDF2 config in this codebase: crypto.pbkdf2(password, salt, 25000, 512, 'sha256', callback) — iterations=25000, keylen=512.

facts_auth_1207037626924.content: When adding a new field that must be used at runtime, verify it is consumed by existing code paths, not just added to the schema.

thoughts_auth_1271325795756.content: Adding a required field to login() breaks auth for all pre-existing users lacking that field; handle missing values gracefully or migrate existing records first

facts_auth_1271327372380.content: A password hash field requires a corresponding salt field in the same hook and collection; omitting salt makes verification impossible

conventions_srcauth_1271328658175.content: Colocate PBKDF2 hashing in a shared utility module rather than duplicating pbkdf2 calls across hooks and services

facts_srcauth_1271330474020.content: Use Payload's `beforeChange` hook to hash passwords at write time, keeping the plain-text password out of the request lifecycle entirely

thoughts_authservicets_1808726061015.content: Changing a login/sign-in function signature (e.g., removing parameters or altering return shape) in auth-service.ts breaks all callers — including callers outside the auth module. Always check cross-m

facts_password_hashing_utility_180872807.content: Password hash utilities are centralized into a standalone module (`password-hash.ts`) rather than inlined in hooks or AuthService, enabling reuse across login, registration, and reset flows.

thoughts_srccollectionsusersts161169_190.content: A beforeChange hook that returns undefined when data.password is absent destroys the existing stored passwordHash on any profile update.

facts_srccollectionsuserstestts274_19039.content: Tests for field-level behavior must validate the correct (fixed) behavior, not the pre-existing broken behavior, otherwise they lock in the bug.

facts_password_hashing_1903990735394.content: PBKDF2 with 25000 iterations and sha256 was chosen to align with the existing AuthService.verifyPassword pattern.
